summary: CRITICAL: Fixture files (commits_patch.txt, commits_minor.txt, commits_major.txt, commits_none.txt) are referenced but missing—workflow fails on first test. No actionlint validation step despite installing it. Test steps (lines ~30–80) heavily duplicated; all 5 follow identical pattern. Shell scripts lack `set -euo pipefail`. Python script quality is good (types, errors, modularity) but workflow won't execute. Unfixable without fixture files and refactored test harness.
